headline: Piper Sandler Reiterates Neutral on Trade Desk, Lowers Price Target to $28
summary: Piper Sandler  analyst Thomas Champion   reiterates Trade Desk (NASDAQ:TTD) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $50 to $28.

headline: Keybanc Maintains Overweight on Trade Desk, Lowers Price Target to $35
summary: Keybanc  analyst Justin Patterson   maintains Trade Desk (NASDAQ:TTD) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $40 to $35.
